Fact: In the Pokémon Red and Blue beta, Tentacool was originally known as "Jilly".
Tentacool, Toedscool, and their respective evolutionary lines have exactly the same base stats in the same distribution.
Tentacool's Water-type is strong against Toedscool's Ground-type, but weak to its Grass-type. Similarly, Tentacool's Poison-type is strong against Toedscool's Grass-type, but weak to its Ground-type.
